underlying_goal: Create and iteratively refine a Claude Code skill for managing project code comments via git stash/patch workflow, then use it to stash/restore annotations
friction_detail: Skill had issues: used non-existent git flag (--check), restored files as staged instead of unstaged, and skill file was named wrong (instructions.md vs SKILL.md).
brief_summary: User wanted a Claude skill for stashing/restoring code comments via git, iteratively refined it through ~7 rounds of feedback fixing naming, flow, and behavior issues, and successfully used it to stash and restore annotations.
